info.title: Bitcoin Mining Farm Calculator API
info.description: Free API for calculating Bitcoin mining farm profitability, CAPEX, OPEX, and multi-year revenue forecasts. Designed for developers, AI agents, and mining operators. Rate limited to 60 requests/minute for external callers.

airflow_m3h.description: * Sound pressure level (dB at rated speed)

cost_usd.description: * Labor hours required for on-site deployment

algorithm.description: * Hash rate in terahashes per second

power_watts.description: * Purchase price per unit in USD

price_usd.description: * Energy efficiency in joules per terahash

release_year.description: * Whether this miner requires water cooling

degradation_year2.description: * Hashrate degradation in year 3+ (fraction per year)

degradation_year3plus.description: * Optional notes about the miner model

miner.description: * Number of units of this miner model to deploy

cableGauge.description: * Copper commodity price used for cable cost estimation (USD/kg)

type.description: * Per-miner air cooling infrastructure cost in USD (used when type is "air")

airCost.description: * Per-miner hydro dry-cooler infrastructure cost in USD (used when type is "hydro")

coveragePercent.description: * Solar panel + inverter installation cost per kW (USD)

installationCostPerKw.description: * Annual solar maintenance as a percent of solar CAPEX

maintenancePercentPerYear.description: * Grid injection credit rate — 100 means full credit, 0 means no credit (0-100)

region.description: * Electricity price per kWh in USD

electricityPriceKwh.description: * Additional tax on electricity as a percentage

regional.description: * Parasitic load as a percentage of total miner power (lighting, networking, etc.) — default 5

poolFeePercent.description: * Monthly maintenance OPEX as a percentage of total CAPEX — default 5

manHoursPerMiner.description: * Hourly labor rate in USD — default 35

hourlyLaborCostUsd.description: * Cable + dedicated fuse breaker cost per miner in USD — default 85

cablesPerMinerUsd.description: * Man-hours to install each transformer — default 8

manHoursPerTransformer.description: * Man-hours to assemble each rack — default 4

manHoursPerRack.description: * Man-hours to set up each container — default 40

labor.description: * Temperature management and cooling hardware selections (optional)

location.description: * Selected dry cooler models and quantities for hydro cooling

dryCoolerSelections.description: * Selected air fan models and quantities for ventilation

infrastructureType.description: * Import tax percentages applied to hardware CAPEX by category

totalHashRateThs.description: * Total wall power draw of all miners (kW)

cableCost.description: * Rack hardware cost (USD, 0 if using containers)

rackCost.description: * Container hardware cost (USD, 0 if using racks)

airFanCapex.description: * Total power consumed by air fans (kW)

minerCost.description: * Total import tax on all hardware (USD)

totalHashRateThs.description: * Total wall power draw of all miners (kW)

cableCost.description: * Rack hardware cost (USD, 0 if using containers)

rackCost.description: * Container hardware cost (USD, 0 if using racks)

airFanCapex.description: * Total power consumed by air fans (kW)

minerCost.description: * Total import tax on all hardware (USD)

m3h.description: * Airflow in cubic feet per minute

ventilation.description: * Combined hash rate of all miners (TH/s)

totalHashRateThs.description: * Combined wall power of all miners (kW)

totalPowerKw.description: * Total power consumed by air cooling fans (kW)

pressure_drop_kpa.description: * Air flow rate through the unit (m³/h)

height_mm.description: * Inlet pipe diameter (mm, as string e.g. "DN80")

estimated_cost_usd.description: * Labor hours required for on-site deployment

months.description: * Revenue strategy: sell all BTC immediately, hold all BTC, or sell only enough to cover OPEX

revenueMode.description: * BTC price projection model — "fixed" holds price constant, "stock_to_flow" uses S2F curve, "stock_to_flow_pessimistic" applies a haircut, "custom" uses startingBtcPrice→finalBtcPrice linear interpolation

btcPriceModel.description: * Pessimistic discount applied to the S2F model (negative percent, e.g. -30 means 30% below S2F)

pessimisticAdjustPercent.description: * Annual network hashrate growth rate (percent, e.g. 25 for 25% YoY)

networkHashrateGrowthPercent.description: * Annual ASIC performance degradation (percent, e.g. 5 for 5% YoY hashrate loss)

asicDegradationPercent.description: * Annual discount rate for NPV / IRR calculations (percent, default 10)

discountRatePercent.description: * Starting BTC price in USD (current market price)

startingBtcPrice.description: * Final BTC price override in USD — null lets the model calculate it automatically

months.description: * Revenue strategy: sell all BTC immediately, hold all BTC, or sell only enough to cover OPEX

revenueMode.description: * BTC price projection model — "fixed" holds price constant, "stock_to_flow" uses S2F curve, "stock_to_flow_pessimistic" applies a haircut, "custom" uses startingBtcPrice→finalBtcPrice linear interpolation

btcPriceModel.description: * Pessimistic discount applied to the S2F model (negative percent, e.g. -30 means 30% below S2F)

pessimisticAdjustPercent.description: * Annual network hashrate growth rate (percent, e.g. 25 for 25% YoY)

networkHashrateGrowthPercent.description: * Annual ASIC performance degradation (percent, e.g. 5 for 5% YoY hashrate loss)

asicDegradationPercent.description: * Annual discount rate for NPV / IRR calculations (percent, default 10)

discountRatePercent.description: * Starting BTC price in USD (current market price)

startingBtcPrice.description: * Final BTC price override in USD — null lets the model calculate it automatically

month.description: * ISO 8601 date string for this period

date.description: * Projected BTC price in USD for this month

btcPrice.description: * Projected total network hashrate in TH/s

difficulty.description: * Block reward at this point (accounts for halvings)

blockReward.description: * Gross mining revenue in USD for this month

miningRevenueUsd.description: * Electricity cost in USD for this month

electricityCostUsd.description: * Total operating expenses in USD for this month

opexUsd.description: * Net profit (revenue minus OPEX) in USD

btcMined.description: * BTC sold this month (depends on revenueMode)

btcBalance.description: * Running total profit/loss in USD (includes CAPEX)

totalRevenue.description: * Total costs including CAPEX and OPEX (USD)

totalCosts.description: * Net profit over the full forecast horizon (USD)

totalProfit.description: * BTC remaining in wallet at the end of the forecast

roiPercent.description: * Months until cumulative profit turns positive — null if never reached

paybackMonths.description: * Internal rate of return (annualized, as a decimal)

irr.description: * Net present value of all cash flows (USD)

npv.description: * BTC price at which monthly mining revenue equals monthly OPEX (USD)

breakEvenBtcPrice.description: * BTC price at which total revenue covers CAPEX + all OPEX (USD)

avgHashpriceUsd.description: * Total BTC mined over the full forecast

name.description: Human-readable model name, e.g. "Antminer S21 Pro"

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer name: Bitmain, MicroBT, Canaan, etc.

hash_rate_ths.description: Hash rate in terahashes per second (TH/s)

efficiency_jth.description: Energy efficiency in joules per terahash (J/TH), lower is better

watercooled.description: Whether the miner requires water/hydro cooling

btcPriceUsd.description: * Total network hashrate in exahashes per second (EH/s)

difficulty.description: * Current block subsidy reward in BTC (e.g. 3.125 after 2024 halving)

blockReward.description: * Mining hashprice in USD per petahash per day ($/PH/day)

hashpriceUsdPhDay.description: * ISO 8601 timestamp of when this data was last fetched

lastUpdated.description: * Whether the data is from a live API call (true) or fallback estimates (false)

miners.description: * Last update info for the dry cooler catalog

dryCoolers.description: * Last update info for the air fan catalog

400.description: Bad Request — invalid or missing request body

429.description: Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded (60 req/min for external callers)

get.summary: List all air cooling fan models
get.description: Returns the catalog of industrial axial fan models for air-cooled Bitcoin mining ventilation. Includes airflow capacity, power consumption, noise level, and deployment labor.

post.description: Calculates comprehensive CAPEX, OPEX, and operational metrics for a Bitcoin mining farm configuration. Accepts a complete FarmConfig and returns all derived values including total hash rate, power draw, heat output, transformer sizing, infrastructure costs, and monthly operating expenses. This is the primary calculation endpoint — send your full farm configuration and receive all metrics in one call.

get.description: Returns the catalog of industrial dry cooler models for hydro-cooled Bitcoin mining farms. Includes capacity ratings at 35°C ambient, physical dimensions, noise levels, and deployment costs.

post.description: Generates a month-by-month Bitcoin mining revenue forecast with BTC price modeling (Stock-to-Flow), network difficulty growth, ASIC degradation, energy inflation, and halving events. Returns NPV, IRR, break-even BTC price, payback period, and cumulative profit/loss for each period. Supports three revenue strategies: sell all BTC, hold all BTC, or sell only enough to cover OPEX.

get.description: Returns the complete catalog of 50+ Bitcoin ASIC mining hardware models with specs, pricing, and degradation curves. Sorted by hash rate descending. Check GET /updates for last data update timestamp.

Returns current Bitcoin network statistics including BTC price (USD), total network hashrate (EH/s), mining difficulty, block reward, and hashprice ($/PH/day). Data is sourced from mempool.space and CoinGecko with a 60-second server-side cache. Falls back to estimated values when APIs are unreachable.
Returns the last update timestamps for all hardware catalogs (miners, dry coolers, air fans). Use this to check data freshness before making calculation requests.
